analysis_report.title: Summary
analysis_report.content: Based on LSTM neural network analysis of V's recent market data, the model predicts an downward price movement for the next trading day with low confidence (55%). This prediction is derived from a combination of technical indicators, price momentum, trading volume patterns, and news sentiment analysis.

analysis_report.title: Price Action & Trend
analysis_report.content: V has shown a slight downward trend recently, with an average daily return of -0.07%. Over the last 20 trading sessions, the stock moved from $322.03 to $317.32 (-1.46%). The technical score of 49% suggests a neutral technical outlook.

analysis_report.title: Volume Analysis
analysis_report.content: Trading volume is near the average level (ratio: 1.26x), suggesting normal market participation. This indicates steady interest without extreme buying or selling pressure.

analysis_report.title: News Sentiment
analysis_report.content: News sentiment analysis shows a moderately positive score of 55%. Recent news about V leans positive, suggesting generally favorable market perception, though not overwhelmingly bullish.

analysis_report.title: Key Drivers
analysis_report.content: The LSTM model identified the most influential factors for this prediction as: RSI Indicator (12%), Price Returns (11%), Moving Average Ratio (11%). RSI Indicator is the most significant factor in the model's decision-making process.

analysis_report.title: Model Confidence
analysis_report.content: The LSTM model achieved 51% accuracy and 0% F1-score on the test dataset. These metrics indicate limited predictive reliability. Stock markets are inherently unpredictable, and predictions should be treated with caution. This model is designed for educational and research purposes only and should not be used as the sole basis for investment decisions.
